creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: antoine
Date: Sat Nov 16 11:29:06 2013
New Revision: 333985
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333985

Log:
  - Move from Google Code to Github
  - Add LICENSE
  - Stage support
  - shebangfix
  
  PR:		ports/183806
  Submitted by:	Vladimir Kotal (maintainer and author)

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/distinfo
  head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/pkg-descr

Modified: head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/Makefile	Sat Nov 16 07:52:31 2013	(r333984)
+++ head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/Makefile	Sat Nov 16 11:29:06 2013	(r333985)
@@ -4,26 +4,23 @@
 PORTNAME=	ipv6gen
 PORTVERSION=	1.0
 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt ipv6
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
-EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
+MASTER_SITES=	http://github.com/vladak/${PORTNAME}/archive/${PORTVERSION}.tar.gz?dummy=/
 
 MAINTAINER=	vlada@devnull.cz
 COMMENT=	IPv6 prefix generator
 
-MAN1=	${PORTNAME}.1
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
+FETCH_ARGS=	-Fpr
 NO_BUILD=
-USES=		perl5
+USES=		perl5 shebangfix
 USE_PERL5=	run
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/${PORTNAME} bin/check-overlap
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
+SHEBANG_FILES=	ipv6gen.pl check-overlap.pl
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/ipv6gen bin/check-overlap man/man1/ipv6gen.1.gz
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL} -o ${SHAREOWN} -g ${SHAREGRP} -m 0755 \
-	${WRKSRC}/ipv6gen.pl ${PREFIX}/bin/ipv6gen
-	${INSTALL} -o ${SHAREOWN} -g ${SHAREGRP} -m 0755 \
-	${WRKSRC}/check-overlap.pl ${PREFIX}/bin/check-overlap
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/ipv6gen.1 ${PREFIX}/man/man1/ipv6gen.1
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/ipv6gen.pl ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/ipv6gen
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/check-overlap.pl ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/check-overlap
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/ipv6gen.1 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/man/man1/ipv6gen.1
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/distinfo	Sat Nov 16 07:52:31 2013	(r333984)
+++ head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/distinfo	Sat Nov 16 11:29:06 2013	(r333985)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ipv6gen-1.0.tgz) = 8d5239d3f3c508b00d68182ae4f4403bda1428ef222d7a28e192fd678db4858a
-SIZE (ipv6gen-1.0.tgz) = 12952
+SHA256 (ipv6gen-1.0.tar.gz) = aaf0638ba78eac56b667f504433580b9edba43e861d7d8596091c8542313583b
+SIZE (ipv6gen-1.0.tar.gz) = 12978

Modified: head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/pkg-descr	Sat Nov 16 07:52:31 2013	(r333984)
+++ head/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/pkg-descr	Sat Nov 16 11:29:06 2013	(r333985)
@@ -5,4 +5,4 @@ ipv6gen features:
       via one of the 3 methods described in RFC 3531
 
 
-WWW: http://code.google.com/p/ipv6gen/
+WWW: https://github.com/vladak/ipv6gen/wiki/IPv6-prefix-generator
